summary: Re-engagement and Momentum System testing completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all dashboard re-engagement components: Login Interstitial modal, Action Banner, Active Chains Chip ('Stories') with Resume Drawer, and StoryChainView with momentum messaging and AI suggestions panel.

integration_issues.issue: The video-chain-actions panel with Quick Continue and Remix buttons exists in StoryVideoStudio.js but the main route /app/story-video-studio uses StoryVideoPipeline.js which does not have these features
integration_issues.note: The code exists but routing uses different component. Backend APIs (continue-video, active-video-chains, video-chain/{id}) work correctly.

action_items: Consider integrating video chain actions panel from StoryVideoStudio.js into StoryVideoPipeline.js to enable video continuation features in the active route
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/photo-to-comic/active-chains correctly returns chains with momentum_msg, milestone_next, episodes_to_milestone fields
POST /api/metrics/track works for all event types (login_interstitial_shown/continue, banner_shown, continue_from_banner, suggestion_view/click)
GET /api/metrics/reengagement is properly admin-only protected and returns all required metrics fields
POST /api/photo-to-comic/chain/suggestions returns context-aware suggestions with references_character and continues_from fields, caching verified (1h TTL)
GET /api/story-video-studio/active-video-chains returns chains with momentum_msg field
GET /api/story-video-studio/video-chain/{chain_id} validates chain_id and returns 404 for invalid
Dashboard LoginInterstitial shows 'YOUR STORY IS WAITING', progress bar, momentum msg, Continue/Later buttons
Dashboard ActionBanner shows progress bar, Continue CTA, dismiss button with 4h resurface
Stories chip (active-chains-chip) in navbar with badge count, opens Resume Drawer with top 3 chains
Resume Drawer shows chains with progress bars, momentum messages, View/Continue buttons
StoryChainView shows momentum messaging below progress bar (e.g., '4 more episodes to reach 5-episode milestone')
StoryChainView AI suggestions panel generates 3 context-aware suggestions with escalation/twist/deepening types
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing test user with 3 photo-to-comic story chains
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-engagement and Momentum System fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Dashboard shows Login Interstitial modal on first session visit with chain preview, progress bar, momentum msg, Continue/Later CTAs. 2) Action Banner with 'YOUR STORY IS WAITING' text, progress bar, Continue CTA, dismiss (4h resurface). 3) Stories chip in navbar with badge count opens Resume Drawer showing top 3 chains with progress bars and momentum messages. 4) StoryChainView shows momentum messaging below progress bar and AI suggestions panel with 'Get AI Ideas' button generating 3 context-aware suggestions. 5) All backend APIs tested and working. NOTE: StoryVideoStudio video chain actions exist in code but route uses StoryVideoPipeline which lacks these features.

ActiveChainsChip.shows: top 3 chains with progress bars, momentum messages, View/Continue buttons

StoryVideoStudio step 8 panel.note: Component exists in StoryVideoStudio.js but route /app/story-video-studio uses StoryVideoPipeline.js
